title: Das Zaubermännchen
writer: Jacob Grimm, Wilhelm Grimm, Günter Kaltofen
actors: Karl-Heinz Rothin, Karin Lesch, Reinhard Michalke
plot: Once upon a time, there lived a lazy miller who spent all his time drinking wine and telling stories. When the king's treasurer comes to him with a demand to pay the tax, the miller lies that his daughter Marie can spin gold from ...
